PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Donald Sweet, in person, for Melissa Chung, in person, Petitioner.

The court points to the pending efilings in each case and asks counsel if service on the British Consulate has been completed. Mr. Sweet reports that he filed a proof of service to the British Consulate in the Estate of Jonathan Garrish matter on Oct-26-2021 which is confirmed in open court. Mr. Sweet offers additional oral advocacy for the petitions in the related matters. The court then confirms with Mr. Sweet that his client should continue to make mortgage payments on the related real properties.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
